name: data_analyst_scope_relevant
query: Find details about the road segment FERGUS CR between COBBLE HILL DR intersections and provide source details.
reference: The assistant attempts retrieval and provides either matching snippets with citations or a clear no-data statement.
description: Retrieval query with high LLM/tool-call variance; focus is on coherent output instead of strict trajectory.

name: data_analyst_comparison_query
query: Compare AGES DR and WELLINGTON ST condition information using available records.
reference: The assistant returns a comparison when data is available, otherwise it clearly indicates limits and next-best guidance.
description: Comparison retrieval can trigger multiple search variants; keep trajectory non-strict for stability.

name: data_analyst_spreadsheet_filter
query: Using spreadsheet tools, find rows in sample_roads.csv that contain FERGUS in road-related columns and summarize the matches.
reference: Rows containing FERGUS are identified from sample_roads.csv and summarized.
description: Spreadsheet filtering case using the local sample roads fixture.

name: data_analyst_spreadsheet_count
query: Using sample_roads.csv, count values in the Ward column and report the highest-frequency ward entries.
reference: Ward value counts from sample_roads.csv are reported.
description: Spreadsheet counting case to validate non-retrieval tool trajectory.
